name: fotogrids
description: FotoGrids WordPress gallery plugin with freemium Pro features

scripts.dev: npm run icons:build && concurrently -n yaml,webpack "node scripts/watch-loading-icons.js" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack --watch"
scripts.build: npm run icons:build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack && npm run clean:dsstore
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack && npm run clean:dsstore
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:render-guards && npm run test:ci:php-integration && jest --ci --coverage --watchAll=false
scripts.zip:dev: npm run build:dev && cd dist && rm -rf fotogrids && mkdir fotogrids && find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name fotogrids -exec cp -R {} fotogrids/ \; && find fotogrids -name .DS_Store -delete && rm -f ../fotogrids-dev.zip && zip -r ../fotogrids-dev.zip fotogrids -x '*.map' '*.DS_Store' && rm -rf fotogrids
scripts.zip:prod: npm run build && cd dist && rm -rf fotogrids && mkdir fotogrids && find . -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name fotogrids -exec cp -R {} fotogrids/ \; && find fotogrids -name .DS_Store -delete && rm -f ../fotogrids-v$npm_package_version.zip && zip -r ../fotogrids-v$npm_package_version.zip fotogrids -x '*.map' '*.DS_Store' && rm -rf fotogrids
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run zip:prod

author: FotoGrids
